meta.name: Retrospective Insight Extractor
meta.description: Process sprint retrospective notes, cluster feedback themes, identify systemic patterns across multiple retros, and track action items to completion.

parameters.content:
## 20 — Retrospective Insight Extractor

Paste retro notes to the webhook (went well, could improve, action items) and receive:
- Themed clusters of feedback
- Pattern detection across recent retros
- Action item tracking
- Summary report

**Required:** OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Status:** Beta.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { retro_id: body.id || `retro_${Date.now()}`, sprint: body.sprint || body.sprint_number || 'Unknown', team: body.team || 'Unknown', date: body.date || new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), went_well: Array.isArray(body.went_well) ? body.went_well : [body.went_well || ''], could_improve: Array.isArray(body.could_improve) ? body.could_improve : [body.could_improve || ''], action_items: Array.isArray(body.action_items) ? body.action_items : [], facilitator: body.facilitator || 'Unknown', participants: body.participants || [], raw_notes: body.raw_notes || body.notes || '' } }];

values.content: Analyze sprint retrospective notes and extract actionable insights. Group feedback into themes. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 🔄 Retro Insights: Sprint {{ $json.sprint }} — {{ $json.team }} ({{ $json.team_health_signal?.toUpperCase() || 'UNKNOWN' }})
